about.heading: // About Me
about.intro: I'm a .NET & Laravel developer with a unique blend of skills — I create modern web applications, lead a Flutter mobile team, AND build systems that connect to industrial equipment.
about.solutionsIntro: With over 4 years of experience and a dedicated team, I offer end-to-end solutions:

points.web: Full-stack web applications (ASP.NET Core & Laravel)
points.mobile: Cross-platform mobile apps with Flutter (iOS & Android)
points.domain: Domain registration and hosting setup
points.digital: Complete digital transformation for your business

about.final: Whether you need a website, mobile app, or complete industrial system — I have the team and expertise to deliver.

web.title: Web Applications
web.description: Custom web applications built with ASP.NET Core or Laravel PHP. From business portals to e-commerce platforms, I build what you need.

mobile.title: Mobile Apps (Flutter)
mobile.description: I lead a dedicated Flutter team that builds beautiful, cross-platform mobile apps for iOS and Android from a single codebase.

hosting.title: Hosting & Domains
hosting.description: Full hosting solutions including domain registration, SSL certificates, and server setup. I handle everything from code to cloud.

ecommerce.title: E-Commerce Solutions
ecommerce.description: Complete online stores with product management, payment integration, and order tracking. Built with Laravel or ASP.NET Core.

automation.title: Industrial Automation
automation.description: Connect your factory equipment to the web. Monitor machines, track production, and control devices remotely.

api.title: RESTful APIs
api.description: Powerful APIs that power your mobile apps and frontend applications. Built with best practices and documentation.

package.title: Complete Business Package
package.subtitle: I don't just build your application — I get it online!

projects.heading: // Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: Web applications, mobile apps, industrial systems, and more
projects.empty: No projects found in this category

ecommerce.title: E-Commerce Platform
ecommerce.desc: Full-featured online store with product management, shopping cart, payment integration (Stripe/PayPal), and order tracking system built with ASP.NET Core.

hotel.title: Hotel Booking System
hotel.desc: Complete reservation system with room availability calendar, online payments, admin dashboard, automated email confirmations, and customer management.

portal.title: Employee Portal
portal.desc: Internal company portal with leave management, attendance tracking, performance reviews, and company announcements.

realtime.title: Real-Time Multi-Site Data Sync & Alarm Management
realtime.desc: High-performance ASP.NET Core API for ingesting industrial data streams from multiple locations with real-time synchronization.

scada.title: SCADA Systems Integration
scada.desc: Web-based SCADA systems for monitoring and controlling industrial processes with real-time data visualization.

tracker.title: Solar Tracker Controller
tracker.desc: A control and monitoring application for solar tracking systems — manages panel positioning, real-time status updates, and performance optimization for solar farms.

portforwarder.title: PMM Port Forwarder
portforwarder.desc: Serial-to-UDP forwarding utility for PMM systems — enables remote access to serial devices over network.

modbus.title: Modbus Tester (Master & Slave)
modbus.desc: Diagnostic and simulation utility for Modbus networks, supporting both master and slave modes with live data monitoring and command testing.

configurator.title: PMM Product Configurator
configurator.desc: Unified configuration tool for PMM hardware — allows control, installation, and parameter management of all company devices from a single interface.

cowrmat.title: COWRMAT - Crop Optimization Tool
cowrmat.desc: A professional decision-support system designed to optimize crop planning, improve irrigation efficiency, and support sustainable treated wastewater allocation for agricultural management.
